title: 2 Pcs Air Fryer Rack, 7 Inch Stainless Steel Metal Holder and Multi-Purpose Double Layer Rack with 4 Barbecue Sticks, General Air Fryers Accessory Set Suitable for Most 3.7-5.8 QT Air Fryers Ovens
features: 🍖【FIT MOST 3.5L-4.1L AIR FRYER & TOWER 4.3L】Universal round air fryers accessories compatible with Cosori CP137 CO137 3.5 Litre, Ninja AF100UK 3.8 Litre, Tower T17021 T17022 T17024 4.3 Litre, and other brands 3.5L-4.1L. (Note: Do Not Compatible with Philips 4.1L Air Fryer. Compatible with a Minimum Inner Diameter of 19cm, and depth of 7.5cm, please measure your air fryer before purchasing)

🍗【SUPERIOR QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL】These air fryer accessories are made of durable, sturdy 304 stainless steel, which is durable and free of BPA or harmful materials. Don't worry about dangerous chemicals, enjoy fun and healthy cooking. The skewer rack size: is 6.8*2.8in, and the metal holder size: is 6.9*2.0in.

🥩【HIGH TEMPERATURE AND HEAT RESISTANCE】You will get 1x Stainless Steel Steam Grill, 1x Stainless Steel Skewer Rack, 4x Stainless Steel Grill Sticks. This stainless steel steam grill can be used at high temperatures and can be used for a long time, heat resistant, durable, non-stick, exquisite, strong, and will not rust, warp or bend.

🍡【EASY TO CLEAN & STORE】No stick stainless steel construction can stand up to daily use and clean, easy to clean. All accessories can be washed in the dishwasher, dishwasher safe for fast and hassle-free cleanup. The raised design on each rack can be stacked for storage easily and save more countertop space.

🍕【MULTIPURPOSE & RELIABLE AFTER-SALE SERVICE】Our air fryer rack can be used to make kebabs, grilled potatoes, grilled steaks, grilled pizza, grilled vegetables, baked pies, and more. If you have any questions, please get in touch with us, and our service team will provide you with professional and satisfactory service.
